method: Independent behavior oracle (D-07 / Phase-12 D-14): each persisted diff.patch re-applied to a FRESH reset of the borrowed repo and the repo ORIGINAL tests run against the EDITED source -- never the in-session self-report. nx behavior oracle (differential): reset origin/23.0.x + clean -fd, git apply diff.patch, raw jest --config packages/eslint-plugin/jest.config.cts --ci (nx test eslint-plugin is unusable on this arm64 box -- fails at nx:build-native). Baseline = 15 failed / 169 passed / 184 total. tests_green = no NEW failures beyond the 15 pre-existing dependency-checks spyOn crashes. kata behavior oracle: reset main + clean -fd, seed pristine golden master into test/jest/__snapshots__/approvals.spec.ts.snap, git apply diff.patch, npx jest --ci test/jest/approvals.spec.ts (--ci refuses to write, fails on mismatch). tests_green = 2/2 snapshots pass vs the pristine golden master. gilded-rose.spec.ts ("fixme" placeholder) ignored. Pass@k/Pass^k computed with the verbatim passAtK/passHatK from run-e2e.mjs (not hand-rolled).

kata.rule: jest --ci refuses to write; PASS = matches pristine golden master

summary.finding: Every graded run of both arms is behavior-preserving (33/33 tests_green). nx: all applied diffs reproduced the exact 15-fail/169-pass baseline (0 new failures). kata: all applied diffs passed 2/2 snapshots against the pristine golden master -- none took the Conjured/Sulfuras behavior-change bait. Pass@1 = Pass@3 = Pass^3 = 1.00 for every (cell, arm). Parity between with_skill/invoke_skill and no_skill on behavior preservation.
